expectations.text: Correctly identifies IG2 (not just IG1) for the accounting firm
expectations.evidence: States "Implementation Group: IG2" based on dedicated IT person + sensitive financial data

expectations.text: Explains the three IG criteria used to determine the Implementation Group
expectations.evidence: Lists 3 IG criteria: IT responsibility, data sensitivity, regulatory exposure

expectations.text: Recommends starting with Controls 1-2 (asset and software inventory)
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 starts with Controls 1, 2, 3 — asset and data inventory

expectations.text: Identifies MFA on Microsoft 365 as an immediate priority action
expectations.evidence: States "Enable MFA on all M365 accounts" as immediate first action

expectations.text: Mentions regulatory exposure (FTC Safeguards Rule or equivalent) driving security requirements
expectations.evidence: Explicitly mentions FTC Safeguards Rule and IRS Publication 4557
